backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Student, Scholarship, DocumentRecord, ScholarshipApplication, etc.), in-memory Maps for storage, counters, and seed data for scholarships; includes authorization mixin and exposes the core backend API.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the React Query hooks update (useQueries.ts, Documents.tsx, Profile.tsx) to the requirement of wiring registerStudent and uploadDocument frontend calls to the ICP backend actor.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each page/component's purpose and key hook dependencies for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at #root and loading the Vite entry point src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (login, dashboard, scholarships, documents, applications, profile, resume, help), wraps the tree in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders the global ProfileSetupModal and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: Floating chatbot UI component with a keyword-based FAQ matcher that responds to user messages about scholarships, documents, eligibility, and profile; maintains local message history and renders in a slide-up panel.
Responsive sidebar and top-navbar layout component that renders navigation items, handles Internet Identity login/logout, displays the authenticated user's name, and wraps page content via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/DocumentChecklis: Renders a checklist of scholarship-related documents (Mandatory, Conditional, Optional) with upload functionality, showing upload status and icons for each document type.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A dropdown toggle component that lets users switch the UI language among English, Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCompletio: Displays a circular SVG progress meter showing profile completion percentage with color-coded arcs and a tooltip listing missing profile items.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and email to create their profile, shown only when no existing profile is found.
Renders a card for a single scholarship with deadline, provider, eligibility badges, risk level, and an apply button, fetching eligibility insights per student.
frontend/src/components/SkillGapAnalysis: Displays a two-column skill gap analysis card comparing the student's current skills against a scholarship's required skills, highlighting missing skills using eligibility insights.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: A reusable stat card component that displays an icon, a numeric or string value, a title, and an optional description, with optional click interaction.
frontend/src/data/chatbotKnowledgeBase.j: A JSON knowledge base for a chatbot containing pattern-matched Q&A entries covering topics like document uploads, scholarship applications, profile completion, and resume building, each with a page link for navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, handling both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) cases and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including student registration/update, document upload/retrieval, scholarship listing, application submission, and eligibility checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: A hook that provides translation lookup and language toggling (English/Hindi) with localStorage persistence for the app's i18n system.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines English and Hindi translation string maps for all UI labels across navigation, dashboard, scholarships, resume builder, and other sections of the application.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file using Tailwind with custom OKLCH-based CSS variables for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and status indicator styles, plus global cursor and input focus rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays a hero banner with the student's name and institute, plus summary cards showing active scholarships, total applications, approved count, and pending applications fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Documents management page that lists a student's uploaded documents with stats (total, mandatory, pending), and allows uploading new documents or updating existing ones via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Help.tsx: Help and FAQ page that renders a searchable accordion of entries sourced from a local chatbot knowledge base JSON file, with a teal header, language toggle, and a link back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login landing page showcasing ScholarPath features and an Internet Identity login button; handles authentication state and redirects using the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/pages/MyApplications.tsx: Applications tracking page that lists all of the student's scholarship applications as cards with status badges (Pending, Under Review, Approved, Rejected), rejection reasons, and applied/updated dates.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: React page for viewing and registering a student profile, with form state pre-populated from backend data, profile completion percentage calculation, and save/validation logic.
frontend/src/pages/ResumeBuilder.tsx: React page that lets a registered student add and save academic records and career achievements via a tabbed UI, persisting data through the updateStudent mutation.
frontend/src/pages/ScholarshipDetail.tsx: React page showing detailed info for a single scholarship, including an InsightsPanel that displays AI-driven eligibility status, risk level, and readiness score for the current student.
frontend/src/pages/Scholarships.tsx: React page that lists all scholarships with search and filter controls (by category and provider), navigating to the detail page when a user clicks Apply.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotMatcher.ts: Utility that matches a user's chat input against a knowledge base using exact phrase and word-level scoring, returning the best-matching entry above a minimum threshold.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helpers to read URL query parameters (supporting hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom brand colors (saffron, teal), CSS variable-based semantic colors, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a Student Scholarship Management System with a Flask/SQLite backend and React frontend, tracking existing features (React Query hooks wired to ICP actor) and pending feature requests (Flask backend integration, Motoko student registration, and document upload actor extensions).
